ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

Certificate consignee Wuhan New Vision Intl Trade Co.Ltd matches invoice address

lc_check.lc_verification_reasoning: No Letter of Credit reference found in the certificate. The certificate number SEG-25D-329801 does not contain any LC bank-term context.

consignor.certificate_value: Vitrolife Sweden AB, Box 9080, 42132, Göteborg, Sweden
consignor.invoice_value: Vitrolife Sweden AB, Box 9080, 400 92 Göteborg, SWEDEN (footer all pages)

comparison_steps.description: Search for consignor name 'Vitrolife Sweden AB' anywhere in the invoice.
comparison_steps.result: FOUND. 'Vitrolife Sweden AB' appears in the footer of all three invoice pages: 'Vitrolife Sweden AB, Box 9080, 400 92 Göteborg, SWEDEN'. Also appears on page 3 stamp: 'Vitrolife Sweden AB'.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate consignor: 'Vitrolife Sweden AB'. Invoice footer: 'Vitrolife Sweden AB'. Exact match after normalization.
Certificate: Sweden. Invoice footer: SWEDEN. VAT prefix SE in SE556546629801 also confirms Sweden.

rules_applied.description: Koncernstruktur – consignor name found directly in invoice footer
Country verified via VAT prefix SE

consignor.debug_explanation: Certificate consignor is 'Vitrolife Sweden AB' at 'Box 9080, 42132, Göteborg, Sweden'. The invoice is issued by Vitrolife Sweden AB as shown in: (1) the Vitrolife branding/logo in the header, (2) the footer on all three pages stating 'Vitrolife Sweden AB, Box 9080, 400 92 Göteborg, SWEDEN', and (3) the stamp on page 3 'Vitrolife Sweden AB'. The name matches exactly. Country is Sweden in both documents, confirmed also by VAT prefix SE. Minor difference in postal code format (42132 vs 400 92) is immaterial per rule 4.1.5. MATCH.
consignor.motivation: Företagsnamnet 'Vitrolife Sweden AB' i certifikatet kan identifieras exakt i fakturans sidfot på samtliga sidor samt i stämpeln på sida 3. Land Sverige bekräftas via adress och VAT-prefix SE.

consignee.certificate_value: Wuhan New Vision Intl Trade Co.Ltd, 3-1-601 Jintan Technology park, Jintan Road,Jinyintan avenue, Dongxihu District Wuhan 430010, China
consignee.invoice_value: Wuhan New Vision Intl Trade Co.,Ltd, 3-1-601 Jintan Technology park, Jintan Road,,Dongxihu District, CN-430010 Wuhan, China (Invoice address)

comparison_steps.description: Invoice contains an 'Invoice address' field with 'Wuhan New Vision Intl Trade Co.,Ltd'. This is the primary billing field.

Certificate: 'Wuhan New Vision Intl Trade Co.Ltd'. Invoice address: 'Wuhan New Vision Intl Trade Co.,Ltd'. After normalization of punctuation (removing dots and commas in company designations), both resolve to 'wuhan new vision intl trade co ltd'. Exact match.
Certificate: China. Invoice address: China. Exact match.

rules_applied.description: Invoice address (billing field) used as primary consignee identifier
Name verification with normalization of punctuation

consignee.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee is 'Wuhan New Vision Intl Trade Co.Ltd' in China. The invoice has an 'Invoice address' field (primary billing field per 4.2.0.2) showing 'Wuhan New Vision Intl Trade Co.,Ltd' at '3-1-601 Jintan Technology park, Jintan Road, Dongxihu District, CN-430010 Wuhan, China'. After normalization of punctuation ('Co.Ltd' vs 'Co.,Ltd' → 'co ltd'), the names are identical. The address details are consistent (same building, same district, same city). Country China matches exactly. MATCH.
consignee.motivation: Mottagaren 'Wuhan New Vision Intl Trade Co.Ltd' i certifikatet kan identifieras i fakturans faktureringsfält ('Invoice address') som 'Wuhan New Vision Intl Trade Co.,Ltd'. Namnen är identiska efter normalisering av punkter/kommatecken. Land Kina överensstämmer.

goods_description.certificate_value:
Components for culturing media for In Vitro Fertilisation(IVF)
See attached INVOICE NO: 2005620 dated 20250806
goods_description.invoice_value: Invoice no -2005620, Shipping date 20250806; Componets for culturing media & medical instruments for In Vitro Fertilisation IVF - Sterile saline solutions

comparison_steps.description: Certificate contains explicit invoice reference: 'See attached INVOICE NO: 2005620 dated 20250806'. This constitutes an express reference to the invoice ('See attached'). Invoice number: certificate says 2005620, invoice says -2005620 (normalized: 2005620). Date: certificate says 20250806 (2025-08-06), invoice shipping date is 20250806 (2025-08-06). Both match.
comparison_steps.result: Invoice reference verified. Generell varubeskrivning with fakturareferens accepted.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate describes goods as 'Components for culturing media for In Vitro Fertilisation(IVF)'. Invoice page 3 summary states 'Componets for culturing media & medical instruments for In Vitro Fertilisation IVF'. Invoice contains IVF-related products (G-RINSE, G-PGD, EmbryoGlue, SpermGrad, SpermRinse, ICSI, etc.) which are components for IVF culturing media. The certificate's description is consistent with the invoice content.

rules_applied.description: Generell varubeskrivning med fakturareferens – certificate contains explicit reference to invoice with 'See attached INVOICE NO: 2005620 dated 20250806'
Priority 1 (article numbers) not applicable – certificate does not list individual article numbers

goods_description.debug_explanation: The certificate uses a general goods description: 'Components for culturing media for In Vitro Fertilisation(IVF)' with an explicit invoice reference 'See attached INVOICE NO: 2005620 dated 20250806'. Per rule 4.3.5, this is accepted as a 'generell varubeskrivning med fakturareferens' because: (1) the invoice number 2005620 matches, (2) the date 20250806 matches the invoice shipping date 20250806, (3) the expression 'See attached' constitutes an explicit reference to the invoice, and (4) the invoice content (IVF media and instruments) is consistent with the certificate description. No individual article numbers are listed in the certificate, so Priority 1 is not applicable. MATCH.
goods_description.motivation: Certifikatet anger en generell varubeskrivning med uttrycklig hänvisning till faktura nr 2005620 daterad 20250806. Fakturanumret och datumet överensstämmer exakt. Fakturans varuinnehåll (IVF-komponenter) är förenligt med certifikatets beskrivning.

comparison_steps.description: Box 7 contains 'Gross: 256,30 kg'. This is the primary verification quantity per rule 4.4.2.1. Box 6 also contains '14 kolli' (shipment quantity).
comparison_steps.result: Box 7 value: Gross 256.30 kg. Box 6 value: 14 kolli (packages).

comparison_steps.description: Certificate: Gross: 256,30 kg. Invoice: Gross weight (kg): 256,3. The certificate value 256.30 and invoice value 256.3 represent the same number (256.30 = 256.3). Truncation rule: invoice's 256.3 truncated to 1 decimal equals 256.3; certificate is 256.30 (2 decimals). 256.3 with trailing zero = 256.30. These are numerically identical. Weight category: certificate says 'Gross', invoice says 'Gross weight'. Both are GW. Unit: certificate says 'kg', invoice header says '(kg)'. Match.
comparison_steps.result: MATCH. Numerically identical value with matching weight category and unit.

comparison_steps.description: Invoice also states Net weight (kg): 135,9. Certificate only states Gross weight. Certificate does NOT state a net weight value. Therefore, no contradiction exists — the invoice's net weight is additional information not present in the certificate.
Certificate box 6: '14 kolli'. Invoice: 'Number of cartons: 14'. The number matches. This provides additional confirmation.

rules_applied.description: Förekomstkontroll – 256.30 kg GW found in invoice as 256.3 kg Gross weight
Decimal trunkering – 256.30 and 256.3 are numerically identical
No contradiction – invoice NW 135.9 is not contradicted by certificate (certificate doesn't state NW)
Shipment quantity 14 kolli confirmed against Number of cartons: 14

quantity.debug_explanation: Certificate box 7 states 'Gross: 256,30 kg'. Invoice states 'Gross weight (kg): 256,3'. These are numerically identical (256.30 = 256.3; trailing zero difference only). Weight category is Gross/GW in both. Unit is kg in both. Per rule 4.4.2.1, box 7 is the verifieringsgrundande kvantitet. The value is directly identifiable in the invoice. Additionally, certificate box 6 states '14 kolli' and invoice states 'Number of cartons: 14', which confirms the shipment quantity. Invoice also contains Net weight 135.9 kg, but the certificate does not state a net weight, so no contradiction exists per 4.4.3.1. MATCH.
quantity.motivation: Certifikatets bruttovikt 256,30 kg kan identifieras i fakturan som 'Gross weight (kg): 256,3' (numeriskt identiskt). Viktkategori (Gross) och enhet (kg) överensstämmer. Även antalet kolli (14) bekräftas av fakturans 'Number of cartons: 14'.

comparison_steps.description: Invoice page 1 contains 'Country of Origin: Sweden' in the goods table header area. This is an explicit origin field.

Certificate states 'European Community'. Sweden is an EU member state (EU-27). Per rule 4.5.4.1, 'European Community' is treated as equivalent to EU. When the certificate states EU/European Community and the invoice states an EU member state (Sweden), this is verified per 4.5.4.2.
comparison_steps.result: Verified. European Community in certificate = Sweden (EU member) in invoice.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate: European Community. Invoice: Sweden. Sweden is EU member. Per 4.5.4.2: 'Om certifikatet anger EU/European Union/European Community och fakturan anger ett specifikt EU-medlemsland → verifierad.' This rule applies directly.

comparison_steps.step: 4.5.4.1 – Check for non-EU origins in invoice
comparison_steps.description: Invoice only states 'Country of Origin: Sweden' as origin information. No non-EU origins are present in the invoice. The invoice lists only one origin for all goods.
comparison_steps.result: No non-EU origins found. No contradiction.

rules_applied.description: EU normalization – European Community treated as EU
EU ↔ member state equivalence – cert says European Community, invoice says Sweden (EU member)
Enhetligt ursprungsland – invoice states single origin for all goods

country_of_origin.debug_explanation: Certificate box 3 states 'European Community'. Invoice states 'Country of Origin: Sweden'. Sweden is a member of the European Union (EU-27). Per rule 4.5.4.1, 'European Community' is treated as EU. Per rule 4.5.4.2, when the certificate states EU/European Community and the invoice states a specific EU member state, the origin is verified. No non-EU origins appear in the invoice. MATCH.
country_of_origin.motivation: Certifikatet anger 'European Community' som ursprung. Fakturan anger 'Country of Origin: Sweden'. Sverige är EU-medlemsstat. Enligt EU-normaliseringsreglerna behandlas 'European Community' som ekvivalent med EU, och ett EU-medlemsland i fakturan verifierar EU-ursprung i certifikatet.

rule_evaluation_log.result: Not applicable – no LC reference found in certificate
Document A = Certificate (1 page). Document B = Invoice (3 pages). Single certificate, single invoice. Direct pairing.
PASSED. Invoice reference matches (2005620), consignor matches (Vitrolife Sweden AB), consignee matches (Wuhan New Vision Intl Trade Co.Ltd).

rule_evaluation_log.rule_description: Koncernstruktur – consignor search in all invoice files
rule_evaluation_log.result: MATCH. 'Vitrolife Sweden AB' found in invoice footer on all 3 pages and in stamp on page 3.
MATCH. Exact name match after normalization.
MATCH. Country Sweden confirmed via footer address 'SWEDEN' and VAT prefix 'SE'.

rule_evaluation_log.rule_description: Consignee priority order – Invoice address field
rule_evaluation_log.result: Invoice address field identified as primary billing field containing 'Wuhan New Vision Intl Trade Co.,Ltd'.
MATCH. 'Wuhan New Vision Intl Trade Co.Ltd' = 'Wuhan New Vision Intl Trade Co.,Ltd' after punctuation normalization.

MATCH. Certificate references 'INVOICE NO: 2005620 dated 20250806'. Invoice number 2005620 and date 20250806 match. Expression 'See attached' constitutes explicit reference. Invoice content consistent with certificate description.
MATCH. Certificate 256.30 kg GW = Invoice 256.3 kg Gross weight.
Box 7 contains 'Gross: 256,30 kg'. This is the primary quantity.
Certificate states 'Gross' – weight category is explicit.
No contradiction. Certificate only states GW. Invoice also states NW 135.9 but certificate does not claim NW, so no contradictory values.
Certificate: 14 kolli. Invoice: Number of cartons: 14. Confirmed.
MATCH. Certificate: European Community. Invoice: Sweden. Sweden is EU member.
Invoice states single 'Country of Origin: Sweden' for all goods. No non-EU origins.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Invoice number mismatch due to leading dash: certificate says '2005620', invoice says '-2005620'
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: The leading dash/minus in '-2005620' is a formatting artifact (common in invoice numbering systems). The numeric content '2005620' is identical. This is a permitted normalization under standard formatting normalization.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Postal code difference: certificate says '42132' while invoice footer says '400 92'
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Per rule 4.1.5, differences in postal code or street address do not in themselves constitute MISMATCH for consignor. The company name and country are verified. Different postal codes may reflect different office locations of the same company. Additionally, the invoice page 3 stamp shows a different address (Gustaf Werners gata 2, SE-421 32 Västra Frölunda) further confirming multiple addresses for the same company.
256.30 and 256.3 are numerically identical. The trailing zero is not significant. Per allowed decimal truncation rule 4.4.3, this is an exact match.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Goods description mismatch: certificate says 'Components for culturing media for In Vitro Fertilisation(IVF)' while invoice lists individual product names
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Per rule 4.3.5, a general goods description with explicit invoice reference is accepted. Certificate states 'See attached INVOICE NO: 2005620 dated 20250806'. Invoice reference matches. Invoice content (IVF products) is consistent with certificate description. No article-level verification required when generell varubeskrivning applies.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter överensstämmer. Avsändaren Vitrolife Sweden AB, mottagaren Wuhan New Vision Intl Trade Co.Ltd, bruttovikten 256,30 kg och ursprungslandet (EU/Sverige) kan samtliga verifieras mot fakturan. Varubeskrivningen godkänns genom certifikatets uttryckliga hänvisning till fakturanummer 2005620.
overall_assessment.summary: All five checkpoints verified as MATCH. Consignor Vitrolife Sweden AB found in invoice footer/stamp. Consignee Wuhan New Vision Intl Trade Co.Ltd found in Invoice address field. Goods description verified via generell varubeskrivning with explicit invoice reference (2005620, date 20250806). Quantity 256.30 kg GW verified against invoice Gross weight 256.3 kg. Origin European Community verified against invoice Country of Origin: Sweden (EU member state). No contradictions, no non-EU origins in invoice.

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport – Certificate of Origin mot faktura

sections.certificate_value: Vitrolife Sweden AB, Box 9080, 42132, Göteborg, Sweden
sections.invoice_value: Vitrolife Sweden AB, Box 9080, 400 92 Göteborg, SWEDEN (sidfot samtliga sidor)
sections.rule_applied: Företagsnamnet identifierat direkt i fakturans sidfot och stämpel. Land bekräftat via adress och VAT-prefix SE.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets avsändare 'Vitrolife Sweden AB' i Sverige återfinns exakt i fakturans sidfot på alla tre sidor samt i stämpeln på sida 3. Landet Sverige bekräftas av adress och VAT-prefix SE.

sections.certificate_value: Wuhan New Vision Intl Trade Co.Ltd, China
sections.invoice_value: Wuhan New Vision Intl Trade Co.,Ltd, China (Invoice address)
sections.rule_applied: Namn identifierat i fakturans faktureringsfält. Punkteringsskillnad ('Co.Ltd' vs 'Co.,Ltd') normaliserad.
sections.motivation: Mottagaren 'Wuhan New Vision Intl Trade Co.Ltd' i certifikatet återfinns i fakturans faktureringsfält som 'Wuhan New Vision Intl Trade Co.,Ltd'. Namnen är identiska efter normalisering. Land Kina matchar.

sections.certificate_value: Components for culturing media for In Vitro Fertilisation(IVF), See attached INVOICE NO: 2005620 dated 20250806
sections.invoice_value: Invoice no -2005620, Shipping date 20250806; diverse IVF-produkter (G-RINSE, G-PGD, EmbryoGlue, SpermGrad m.fl.)
sections.rule_applied: Generell varubeskrivning med uttrycklig fakturareferens. Fakturanummer och datum verifierade. Fakturans innehåll förenligt med certifikatets beskrivning.
sections.motivation: Certifikatet hänvisar uttryckligen till faktura 2005620 daterad 20250806 med frasen 'See attached'. Fakturanummer och datum matchar exakt. Fakturans varuinnehåll (IVF-komponenter och medier) är förenligt med certifikatets generella beskrivning.

sections.rule_applied: Förekomstkontroll. Bruttovikt 256,30 kg identifierad i fakturan som 256,3 kg (numeriskt identiskt). Antal kolli 14 bekräftat.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets bruttovikt 256,30 kg matchar fakturans 'Gross weight (kg): 256,3' (numeriskt identiskt, skillnaden är enbart ett avslutande nollan). Viktkategori Gross och enhet kg överensstämmer. Antalet kolli (14) bekräftas av fakturans 'Number of cartons: 14'.

sections.rule_applied: EU-normalisering. 'European Community' behandlas som EU. Sverige är EU-medlemsstat. Cert=EU + Faktura=EU-medlemsland → verifierat.
sections.motivation: Certifikatet anger 'European Community' som ursprung. Fakturan anger 'Country of Origin: Sweden'. Sverige är EU-medlemsstat. Enligt EU-normaliseringsreglerna är 'European Community' ekvivalent med EU, och ett specifikt EU-medlemsland i fakturan verifierar EU-ursprung. Inga icke-EU-ursprung förekommer i fakturan.

output_quality_checks.notes: All 5 checkpoints are MATCH with confidence ≥ 0.95. Comparison result IDENTICAL is consistent. Workflow recommendation AUTO_APPROVAL_ELIGIBLE is consistent with IDENTICAL result. No confidence values below 0.85 threshold.
